description: Active conversation — customer replied 3 hours ago. Must NOT trigger follow-up.

messages.content: Hello, do you have a demo I can try before buying?
Absolutely, James! I can set up a 30-minute live demo this week. What day works best for you?
Thursday afternoon would be perfect, maybe 3pm?
Thursday 3pm it is! I'll send a calendar invite shortly.
Got it, thanks. See you then!
